commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an internal code-mode namespace registry and QuickJS bridge, code-mode docs/tests/live repro scripts, an explicit-agent session-key adjustment, a realtime test payload cap, and a CI shard watchdog timeout.

PR surface: Source +638, Tests +538, Docs +185, Config +1, Other +738. Total +2100 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows createCodeModeNamespaceRuntime runs before prepareSource, so a visible namespace whose createScope throws or mutates state would run before invalid module access or disabled language is rejected.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the validation-order defect and add regression coverage; final merge still needs human acceptance of the new namespace security boundary.
